name: llama.cpp
description: Registers a local llama.cpp OpenAI-compatible server as a first-party chat provider using configured model IDs.

env.description: Optional fallback loopback llama.cpp OpenAI-compatible base URL. Defaults to http://localhost:8080/v1.
Optional fallback bearer token for llama.cpp or a protected local proxy when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.
Optional comma-separated llama.cpp model IDs exposed by the local server when no model_ids Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: llama.cpp base URL
settings.description: Loopback OpenAI-compatible base URL for llama.cpp. Defaults to http://localhost:8080/v1 and is restricted by the plugin to localhost, 127.0.0.1, or ::1 /v1 URLs.

settings.label: llama.cpp API token
settings.description: Optional bearer token for llama.cpp or a protected local proxy. Falls back to LLAMACPP_API_KEY.

settings.label: llama.cpp model IDs
settings.description: Model IDs to expose for the local llama.cpp server. Use IDs returned by llama-server /v1/models, --alias, or the loaded model path. Falls back to comma-separated LLAMACPP_MODEL_IDS.

providers.name: llama.cpp
providers.description: Registers configured local llama.cpp OpenAI-compatible chat models and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
